quests.title: Sanitization Protocol
quests.description: Unit activated. Primary directive: clear Highland Plateau of Plateau Hares causing sensor interference. Efficiency is mandatory.

objectives.desc: Execute Sanitization Protocol on Plateau Hares.
Upload sensor calibration data to the Spire.

quests.title: Survey Bot Deployment
quests.description: Omni Survey Bots have gone offline. Recover their data cores and neutralize any hostiles encountered during retrieval.

quests.title: Drone Calibration
quests.description: Plateau Drones are operating outside acceptable parameters. Recalibrate through controlled demolition.

quests.title: Goatling Optimization
quests.description: Highland Goatlings consume resources inefficiently. Terminate the resource drain. Omnicorp tolerates zero waste.

quests.title: Module Selection
quests.description: Your performance metrics exceed baseline. Report to Director Astra Vey at the Spire for Class Module installation.

objectives.desc: Report to Director Astra Vey for module installation.
Demonstrate module functionality on Stone Armadillos.

quests.title: Urban Optimization
quests.description: Extraction Zone Delta requires operational assessment. Deploy and survey the extraction infrastructure.

quests.title: Delta Mining Operation
quests.description: Delta Mining Drones have deviated from their programmed extraction patterns. Reprogram through termination.

quests.title: Assault Drone Termination
quests.description: Delta Assault Drones have gone rogue. Standard termination protocol authorized. Leave no defective unit operational.

quests.title: System Purge
quests.description: A Delta Assault Drone command cluster has formed. Purge the cluster completely. Redundancy is inefficiency.

quests.title: Hardware Survey
quests.description: The Secure Mining Grid contains legacy hardware from pre-Xylos colonization. Survey and catalog all recoverable technology.

quests.title: Grid Sentinel Sweep
quests.description: Grid Sentinel Drones patrol the mining grid. Their patrol patterns are outdated. Update through elimination.

objectives.desc: Update Grid Sentinel Drone patrol patterns.

quests.title: Grid Defender Protocol
quests.description: Grid Defenders are legacy combat units. Their combat algorithms are obsolete. Replace them.

quests.title: Assault Unit Override
quests.description: Grid Assault Units control the grid's central processing node. Override their command protocols with maximum force.

quests.title: Grid Optimization
quests.description: Grid efficiency at 67%. Unacceptable. Optimize through complete hostile unit removal.

quests.title: Assault Unit Purge
quests.description: Multiple Grid Assault Units detected. This represents a processing bottleneck. Eliminate the bottleneck.

quests.title: Data Retrieval
quests.description: Legacy data nodes contain pre-Xylos schematics. Retrieve them before rival factions corrupt the data.

quests.title: Assault Unit Command
quests.description: A Grid Assault Unit command cluster has seized grid sector 7. This is unauthorized access. Terminate all unauthorized processes.

quests.title: Advanced Calibration
quests.description: A Resonance Echo has generated signal interference across grid frequencies. Eliminate the interference source.

quests.title: Advanced Calibration Report
quests.description: All calibration targets achieved. Return to the Spire for Advanced Unit certification and performance bonus allocation.

quests.title: Data Retrieval
quests.description: The Skybridge Reactor contains pre-colonization power systems. Initiate data retrieval from the Reactor's legacy systems.

quests.title: Assembly Drone Acquisition
quests.description: Titan Assembly Drones are valuable manufacturing units. Acquire them for Omnicorp R&D — intact or in pieces.

quests.title: Sentinel Protocol Update
quests.description: Titan Assembly Sentinels guard the Reactor core. Their security protocols are incompatible with Omnicorp systems. Override.

quests.title: Proto Core Analysis
quests.description: Titan Proto Cores are failed Titan experiments. Omnicorp wants the failure data. Extract it from the Cores — forcibly.

objectives.desc: Extract failure data from Proto Cores.

quests.title: Serpent Energy Collection
quests.description: Storm Rift Serpents feed on the Reactor's energy output. This is theft of corporate resources. Recover the stolen energy.

quests.title: Cradle Expanse Monitoring
quests.description: The Cradle Expanse requires orbital monitoring station deployment. Establish Omnicorp surveillance of the contested zone.

quests.title: Rift Stalker Observation
quests.description: Aethel Rift Stalkers are biological anomalies. Collect specimens for Omnicorp Bio-Division analysis.

quests.title: Behemoth Specimen
quests.description: Aethel Behemoths contain unique biological power cells. Harvest them for Omnicorp energy research.

quests.title: Sentinel Reactivation
quests.description: Titan Assembly Sentinels auto-reactivate every 72 hours. Implement permanent shutdown procedure.

quests.title: Firmware Update
quests.description: System analysis indicates Ascension-ready status. Report to Director Astra Vey for Firmware v3.0 installation.

objectives.desc: Stress-test Firmware on Titan Proto Core.

quests.title: Aerial Monitoring
quests.description: Orbital Sentinel Command provides planetary-wide sensor coverage. Omnicorp will integrate its systems with our network.

quests.title: Drake Signal Interference
quests.description: The Ashen Drake disrupts corporate transmission signals. Signal interference is unacceptable. Neutralize the source.

quests.title: Carapace Analysis
quests.description: Aethel Iron Carapaces have armor superior to Omnicorp alloys. Reverse-engineer through systematic deconstruction.

quests.title: Corrupted Behemoth Purge
quests.description: Aethel Corrupted Behemoths are corrupted data given physical form. Delete them.

quests.title: Abyssal Firewall
quests.description: Aethel Abyssal Reavers are attempting network intrusion at the orbital level. Deploy counter-intrusion measures.

quests.title: Orbital Network Defense
quests.description: Hostile entities probing orbital network nodes. Deploy automated defense protocols.

quests.title: Drake System Shutdown
quests.description: The Ashen Drake has re-initialized. Execute System Shutdown on the Drake process. No process is immune to termination.

quests.title: Grid Expansion
quests.description: Omnicorp grid expansion into the Expanse faces hostile resistance. Override resistance with superior firepower.

quests.title: Reaver Network Breach
quests.description: Abyssal Reavers are executing a coordinated network breach. Isolate and terminate all intrusion vectors.

quests.title: System Master
quests.description: The System Master certification trial. Terminate Ashen Drake and two elite threats to prove System Master operational status.

quests.title: Subterranean Analysis
quests.description: The Void Echo Chasm represents a dimensional anomaly. Omnicorp authorizes full analysis. All sensor data will be uploaded to the Spire.

quests.title: Reaver Debug
quests.description: Void Reavers are runtime errors in the dimensional fabric. Execute Debug Protocol on all Reaver instances.

quests.title: Channeler Malware
quests.description: Void Channelers are running unauthorized void-energy scripts. Classify as malware. Execute Anti-Malware Protocol.

quests.title: Abyssal Process Termination
quests.description: Aethel Abyssal Reavers are high-priority system processes that cannot be terminated through normal means. Deploy Kill Command.

objectives.desc: Deploy Kill Command on Abyssal processes.

quests.title: Behemoth Error Correction
quests.description: Aethel Corrupted Behemoths are error cascades in the void system. Execute Error Correction Protocol.

quests.title: Fragmenter Segmentation Fault
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters cause segmentation faults in neural network operatives. Patch the vulnerability at the source.

quests.title: Chrono Runtime Error
quests.description: Chrono Wraiths generate temporal runtime errors. Time is a resource — these errors waste it. Terminate all Wraith processes.

quests.title: Jotunn Resource Conflict
quests.description: A Gigantic Jotunn occupies a high-value resource node. Resolve the resource conflict through Jotunn process termination.

quests.title: Heart Sector Analysis
quests.description: The Shattered Heart is an unexploited resource sector. Omnicorp authorizes full sector analysis and asset deployment.

quests.title: Resource Extraction
quests.description: THE DRAKE EXTRACTION OPERATION. The Ashen Drake is a Class-A energy asset. Extract its core for Omnicorp reactor fuel. Raid Tier-1. Efficiency is the only metric.

quests.title: Anti-Virus Protocol
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters have multiplied beyond acceptable parameters. Execute comprehensive Anti-Virus sweep.

quests.title: Total Void Cleanup
quests.description: Operation Total Void Cleanup. All void entities classified as system junk. Execute Disk Cleanup Protocol.

quests.title: Stalker Rootkit
quests.description: A Void Stalker operates as a rootkit in the void network. Rootkits must be removed at the kernel level.

quests.title: Temporal Patch
quests.description: Chrono Wraiths exploit temporal vulnerabilities. Deploy Temporal Stability Patch across all affected sectors.

quests.title: Heart Sector Purge
quests.description: The Shattered Heart sector contains residual hostile processes. Execute Sector Purge Protocol.

objectives.desc: Execute Sector Purge on Void Reavers.

quests.title: Jotunn Server Shutdown
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns function as organic servers hosting hostile processes. Shut them down.

quests.title: Tyrant Hardware Removal
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants are foreign hardware installations in the Heart sector. Remove all foreign hardware.

quests.title: Harbinger Mainframe
quests.description: The Abyss Harbinger is the master process controlling void anomalies. Prepare for total system shutdown.

quests.title: Fragmenter Process Kill
quests.description: Soul Fragmenters are spawning child processes. Execute Process Kill on all Fragmenter processes and subprocesses.

quests.title: The Harbinger Shutdown
quests.description: FINAL SHUTDOWN SEQUENCE. The Abyss Harbinger is the void's master process. Execute total system shutdown. Raid Boss Tier-2. All Omnicorp resources authorized. System integrity must be restored.

objectives.desc: Secure the Shutdown Code for Omnicorp.

quests.title: Structural Stabilization
quests.description: The Severance Faultline is a structural integrity failure. Omnicorp will deploy gravity anchors to stabilize the planetary crust.

quests.title: Carapace Deconstruction
quests.description: Aethel Iron Carapaces contain minerals essential for gravity anchor construction. Deconstruct and extract.

quests.title: Tyrant Structural Interference
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants disrupt anchor calibration. Eliminate interference sources.

quests.title: Jotunn Anchor Site
quests.description: Gigantic Jotunns refuse to vacate anchor deployment sites. Deploy anchors regardless.

quests.title: Core Integration Prep
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core will become Omnicorp's primary server farm. Begin integration assessment.

quests.title: Core Security Sweep
quests.description: Hostile processes detected in Core systems. Execute security sweep.

quests.title: Behemoth System Crash
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths cause system crashes in Core infrastructure. Prevent crash cascade.

quests.title: Rift Stalker Network
quests.description: Rift Stalkers have established a peer-to-peer network in the Core. Disconnect all nodes.

quests.title: Gravity Algorithm
quests.description: The Gravity Titan's algorithm can manipulate mass. Omnicorp will copy that algorithm and deploy it across the network.

quests.title: Gravity Recalibration
quests.description: GRAVITY RECALIBRATION OPERATION. The Gravity Titan's algorithm is the key to mass manipulation. Defeat the Raid Boss Tier-3 entity and download the complete algorithm. Omnicorp will control gravity itself.

quests.title: Automated Manufacturing
quests.description: The Prima Materia Forge will become Omnicorp's primary manufacturing facility. Initiate facility takeover.

quests.title: Defense System Override
quests.description: Ancient Forge defenses reject Omnicorp network integration. Override with extreme prejudice.

quests.title: Quality Assurance
quests.description: Corrupted Behemoths are defective products contaminating the Forge. Execute Product Recall and Disposal.

quests.title: Competitor Removal
quests.description: Abyssal forces have entered the Forge — unauthorized access detected. Remove all unauthorized users.

quests.title: Jotunn Workflow Termination
quests.description: Jotunns are interfering with Forge workflow automation. Terminate interfering processes.

quests.title: Mass Production Protocol
quests.description: Initiate Mass Production Protocol. All rival presence in the Forge is a production inefficiency.

quests.title: Automaton Reprogramming
quests.description: Titan Forge Automatons resist Omnicorp programming. Reprogram through combat override.

quests.title: Proto Core Recycling
quests.description: Titan Proto Cores are failed products. Recycle for raw materials.

quests.title: Executive Legend Trial
quests.description: The Executive Legend certification trial. Eliminate both Titan and Harbinger in one operational cycle. Prove systematic superiority.

quests.title: Executive Legend
quests.description: CEO Valerius personally authorizes your Executive Legend certification. Return to the Spire for system-wide recognition broadcast.

quests.title: Apex Quality Control
quests.description: The Hidden Aethelgardian City contains Precursor technology caches. Omnicorp authorizes full technology acquisition.

quests.title: City Defense Removal
quests.description: City defenses are incompatible with Omnicorp protocols. Remove legacy defense systems.

quests.title: Tech Database Download
quests.description: The City holds a Precursor tech database. Download all data for Omnicorp R&D.

quests.title: Apex Drake Deletion
quests.description: The Apex Ashen Drake is a legacy biological process. Execute permanent deletion.

quests.title: Apex Harbinger Uninstall
quests.description: The Apex Abyss Harbinger has reinstalled itself. Execute permanent uninstall.

quests.title: Apex Titan Format
quests.description: The Gravity Titan has reformatted. Execute full disk format on Titan instance.

objectives.desc: Execute full disk format on Titan.

quests.title: Tri-Process Termination
quests.description: All three Apex processes — Drake, Titan, Harbinger. Execute concurrent termination. System resources: unlimited.

quests.title: Core Integration
quests.description: The Aethel Siphon Core is now Omnicorp Central Server. Complete full systems integration.

quests.title: World Engine Source Code
quests.description: The World Engine is the ultimate source code. Omnicorp will acquire exclusive access.

quests.title: Source Code Compile
quests.description: Compile the World Engine source code. Omnicorp's greatest software deployment. Defend the compile process.

quests.title: Final System Cleanup
quests.description: The compiled Engine flushes residual errors. Execute final system cleanup at the Faultline.

quests.title: Void System Purge
quests.description: The void is a deprecated system. Purge all remaining void instances permanently.

quests.title: Tyrant Legacy Removal
quests.description: Crystal Tyrants are legacy hardware. Execute legacy hardware removal.

quests.title: Forge Final Production
quests.description: Final Forge production cycle. Eliminate all variables that could impact production efficiency.

quests.title: Expanse Network Control
quests.description: The Cradle Expanse is now Omnicorp-managed territory. Enforce network control protocols.

quests.title: Orbital System Maintenance
quests.description: Orbital systems require quarterly maintenance. Clear all orbital sectors of hostile elements.

quests.title: Final System Backup
quests.description: Execute final system backup before singularity. Eliminate all threats to backup integrity.

quests.title: The Final Override
quests.description: Execute the Final Override. Terminate Jotunn, Drake, and Harbinger processes. All system authority transfers to Omnicorp.

quests.title: The Singularity
quests.description: The deepest Void Echo Chasm. Defeat the Eternal forms of Titan and Harbinger. All system resources converge on this moment. The Singularity awaits.

quests.title: The Singularity
quests.description: SYSTEM STATUS: SINGULARITY ACHIEVED. All processes terminated. All systems integrated. All authority centralized. Return to the Spire. CEO Valerius confirms: YOU are now the operating system of Xylos. Efficiency is eternal. You are eternal.

objectives.desc: Return to the Spire as the Singularity.
Receive Singularity certification from CEO Valerius.
